name: SM16716 LED driver
description: The SM16716 component represents a SM16716 LED driver chain ([SM16716 description](https://github.com/sowbug/sm16716/blob/master/SM16716%20Datasheet%20%5BChinese%5D.pdf), [SM16716 description](https://github.com/sowbug/sm16716/blob/master/SM16716%20Datasheet%20%5BChinese%5D.pdf)) in ESPHome. Communication is done with two GPIO pins (MOSI and SCLK) and multiple driver chips can be chained. It is used in some smart light bulbs:

config_entries.label: Mode
config_entries.description: Pin mode flags (input / output / pullup / pulldown / open_drain). Combine flags as needed — e.g. input + pullup for a button pulled to VCC.

config_entries.label: Open Drain
config_entries.description: Set the open drain mode flag.

config_entries.label: Inverted
config_entries.description: Invert the logical level. ``true`` swaps high/low in software so an active-low button reads as active when grounded.
